items.briefing:
Australian organisations should be aware of a surge in Chinese-linked phishing activity flagged by Google, which targets credentials and sensitive data — a threat relevant to any Australian business or government agency using online services. Separately, Scamwatch is reminding small businesses to stay alert to scams, which remain a significant financial risk. A new report also highlights pressure on Australian public sector agencies to improve their cyber resilience as digital transformation accelerates.

AI tools are now helping cybercriminals develop attacks faster than security scanners can detect them, meaning threats can slip through even recently updated defences. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email asking you to click a link or log in, go directly to the official website instead of using the link provided.

featured.title: Kinetic IT report flags AI & sovereign execution gap
featured.quote: Australian government agencies lack funding and skills to safely deploy AI technology.
